cases.name: unbounded variable-length traversal returning both endpoints
variable-length traversal bounded to depth 3-5 (expect empty with shallow fixture)
bind unbounded path variable reaching a typed endpoint
bind path variable for unbounded traversal between typed endpoints
bounded incoming variable-length traversal with depth range 2-5
bind expansion path where the source and destination must be distinct nodes
cases.cypher: match p = (s:NodeKind1)-[*..]->(e:NodeKind2) where s <> e return p

cases.name: bind an incoming unbounded expansion path to a typed source
bind expansion path filtered by a regular expression on the endpoint name
cases.cypher: match p = (n:NodeKind1)-[:EdgeKind1|EdgeKind2*1..2]->(r:NodeKind2) where r.name =~ '1.*' return p limit 10

cases.name: bind incoming expansion path where source matches a kind disjunction
cases.cypher: match p = (t:NodeKind2)<-[:EdgeKind1*1..]-(a) where (a:NodeKind1 or a:NodeKind2) and t.objectid ends with '-2' return p limit 1000
